hero.description: Full-Stack Developer focused on creating modern interfaces, user experience, and high-impact digital products.

about.title: About Me
about.tagline: Computer Engineer & Full-Stack Developer passionate about creating functional and aesthetic technology.
about.p1: I'm Francisco González, a Computer Engineer focused on web development and building digital products that solve real-world problems. I specialize in creating scalable, well-structured applications with a carefully crafted user experience.
about.p2: I've collaborated on various projects, ranging from high-precision clinical applications for critical units to SaaS platforms for appointment management and analysis tools for esports teams.
about.p3: My goal is to continue learning and applying the latest technologies to transform complex ideas into simple, powerful, and elegant software.

projects.title: Projects
projects.allProjectsSubtitle: A complete collection of my technological works and experiments.

planly.title: Planly SaaS
planly.description: SaaS platform for reservation management and appointment scheduling.
planly.role: Full-Stack development of a comprehensive platform for professionals and companies needing to manage their calendars.
planly.objective: Automate the appointment booking process, eliminating the need for manual coordination and reducing no-shows.
planly.problemSolved: Centralizes the availability of multiple professionals, manages payments, and sends automatic reminders, solving manual scheduling chaos.

guty-finance.title: Guty Finance PWA
guty-finance.description: Progressive Web App for personal finance and student transport management.
guty-finance.role: Full development of a PWA designed for tracking daily expenses and transport card balances (Bip!/TNE).
guty-finance.objective: Provide a simple and fast tool to monitor personal finances without depending on banks.
guty-finance.problemSolved: Addresses the lack of control over small daily expenses and allows for automatic monthly transport expense projections.

valorant.title: Valorant Training Hub (In Development)
valorant.description: Platform for management and tracking of Valorant team training.
valorant.role: Web platform development oriented towards coaches and analysts for tracking team metrics.
valorant.objective: Provide a centralized tool for esports teams to analyze their performance and plan training sessions.
valorant.problemSolved: Facilitates the organization of tactical and statistical data that was previously handled in scattered spreadsheets.

clima.title: Weather App
clima.description: Real-time weather application with detailed meteorological data.
clima.role: Web application development consuming external API for real-time data visualization.
clima.objective: Offer accurate and accessible climate information for any city in the world with a clean interface.
clima.problemSolved: Simplifies the visualization of complex metrics (humidity, wind, pressure) into a user-friendly interface.

mini-apps.title: Frontend Mini Applications
mini-apps.description: Collection of interactive mini applications focused on frontend logic.
mini-apps.role: Development of various modules to solve specific problems through simple interfaces.
mini-apps.objective: Demonstrate skills in DOM manipulation, state, and business logic on the frontend.
mini-apps.problemSolved: Solves small daily needs through quick and lightweight tools without feature overhead.

calculadora-financiera.title: Financial Calculator
calculadora-financiera.description: Interactive tool for interest calculation and financial projections.
calculadora-financiera.role: Web application development for economic projections oriented towards non-technical users.
calculadora-financiera.objective: Help people understand the impact of compound interest and plan their savings or investments.
calculadora-financiera.problemSolved: Makes complex financial calculations accessible that are usually difficult to perform manually for the general public.

dva-uci.title: Vasoactive Drug Calculator
dva-uci.description: Clinical calculator for precise drug dosing in critical units.
dva-uci.role: Clinical support tool development for medical decisions in ICU.
dva-uci.objective: Minimize human errors in the calculation of critical doses of vasoactive medications.
dva-uci.problemSolved: Automates complex calculations based on weight and dilution, ensuring patient safety in high-pressure environments.

skills.title: Tech Collaborations
skills.subtitle: I use these professional-grade tools to build scalable experiences and products.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a role, partnership, or collaboration in mind? I'd love to hear from you.
contact.tagline: Let's connect and create something awesome.
contact.description: Whether you're a brand looking for a developer, a company in need of tech expertise, or just want to chat about tech, I'd love to hear from you.
